pages.title: Move Over (Minimal Groove Mix)
pages.tagline: Step aside for the king of summer heat.

pages.body: This F minor masterpiece at 129 BPM invites you onto a stripped-down dance floor where late-eighties hip-house meets minimal techno. A tight four-on-the-floor kick drives smooth, funky bass riffs alongside sparse synth stabs and dry snares. Confident male rap verses battle cool female lead vocal chops in call-and-response hooks that demand the crowd move with swagger. The track breathes between sections of deep resonance and collective hype, emphasizing a singular presence without overproduced festival elements. It is a confident declaration urging others to clear space for an undeniable summer night energy.
pages.styleSentence: A driving F minor track at 129 BPM featuring a stripped-down late-80s/early-90s hip-house and Eurodance groove with a tight four-on-the-floor kick, funky bass riff, sparse synth stabs, dry snare/clap, confident male rap verses, cool female hype vocals, call-and-response hooks, and dance-floor swagger without overproduced festival elements.

pages.text:
Title: Move Over (Minimal Groove Mix)

[Intro - Female, Cool Spoken]
Somebody said the floor already had a king?
Ha.
Move over.

[Beat Starts - Minimal Kick, Bass, Clap]

[Hook - Female Lead, Cool and Catchy]
Move over
We got heat in the room
Move over
Summer came through smooth

Don’t talk too much
Just let that bassline hit
This summer different
You can tell by the drip

[Groove 1 - Female Spoken & Ad-Libs]
(Yeah)
Let it ride

Bassline talking
(shh, just listen)

Slow steps, low lights
(so smooth)

Keep it simple
Just move

[Female Ad-Lib]
Mmm.
That’s enough.
Let it breathe.

[Hook - Female Lead]
Move over
We got heat in the room
Move over
Summer came through smooth

Don’t talk too much
Just let that bassline hit
This summer different
You can tell by the drip

[Post-Hook - Crowd, Dry Chant]
Move.
Move.
Move over.
Move.
Move.
Move over.

[Groove 2 - Call & Response, Chants]
[Female Call]
You feel that?
[Crowd Response]
Oh, we do.

[Female Call]
Turn it up.
[Crowd Response]
Slide it through.

[Female Spoken]
Soft steps.
Deep bass.

[Crowd Murmur]
(mmm, yeah, right there)

[Pre-Hook - Female Spoken]
Don’t rush it.
Don’t force it.
Just catch it.

[Hook - Female Lead]
Move over
We got heat in the room
Move over
Summer came through smooth

Don’t talk too much
Just let that bassline hit
This summer different
You can tell by the drip

[Bridge - Minimal Breakdown]
Kick.
Clap.
Bass.
Breathe.

Kick.
Clap.
Bass.
Breathe.

[Female Spoken]
Somebody said the floor had a king?
Cute.

[Final Hook - Female Lead]
Move over
We got heat in the room
Move over
Summer came through smooth

Don’t talk too much
Just let that bassline hit
This summer different
You can tell by the drip

[Outro - Crowd Chant]
Move.
Move.
Move over.
This summer different.
Move.
Move.
Move over.
